architecture.summary: E2E verification increment - tests existing sync pipeline create/update/close lifecycle across GitHub/JIRA/ADO

integrations.summary: GitHub Issues, JIRA SWE2E/WTTC, ADO SpecWeaveSync - all configured in umbrella config.json

ui-ux.summary: No UI - CLI-only sync verification via specweave sync-progress

performance.summary: No performance concerns - single sync lifecycle run

security.summary: API tokens from .env, never exposed in output

edge-cases.summary: Dedup check ensures no duplicate items created on re-runs
